[property]
gpu-id=0
net-scale-factor=0.00392156862745098
model-color-format=0

# DeepStream-Yolo exported ONNX
onnx-file=/home/user/deepstream-work/models/yolo12x.onnx

# Generated by nvinfer on first run
model-engine-file=/home/user/deepstream-work/models/yolo12x.onnx_b1_gpu0_fp16.engine

# COCO labels
labelfile-path=/home/user/deepstream-work/models/coco_labels.txt

batch-size=1
network-mode=2
num-detected-classes=80
interval=0
gie-unique-id=1
process-mode=1
network-type=0

# YOLO parser
parse-bbox-func-name=NvDsInferParseYolo
custom-lib-path=/home/user/deepstream-work/lib/libnvdsinfer_custom_impl_Yolo.so
output-blob-names=output

# NMS
cluster-mode=2

# Keep aspect ratio during nvinfer preprocessing
maintain-aspect-ratio=1
symmetric-padding=1

[class-attrs-all]
pre-cluster-threshold=0.25
nms-iou-threshold=0.45
topk=300
